```js title=main.js
"use strict";
(self["rspackChunk"] = self["rspackChunk"] || []).push([["main"], {
"./Layout.js"(__unused_rspack_module, __rspack_exports, __rspack_require) {
var __webpack_exports__ = __rspack_exports;
var __webpack_require__ = __rspack_require;
__rspack_require.d(__rspack_exports, {
  defaults: () => (defaults)
});
const defaults = {
	test: 1000
};


},
"./export.js"(__unused_rspack_module, __rspack_exports, __rspack_require) {
var __webpack_exports__ = __rspack_exports;
var __webpack_require__ = __rspack_require;
__rspack_require.d(__rspack_exports, {
  Something: () => (Something)
});
/* import */ var _Layout__rspack_import_0 = __rspack_require("./Layout.js");

class Test {
	test = _Layout__rspack_import_0.defaults.test + 20000;
}
var Sider = new Test();
var Something = 333;


},
"./index.js"(__unused_rspack_module, __unused_rspack___rspack_exports, __rspack_require) {
var __webpack_require__ = __rspack_require;
/* import */ var _export__rspack_import_0 = __rspack_require("./export.js");


(0,_export__rspack_import_0.Something)();


},

},function(__rspack_require) {
var __rspack_exec = function(moduleId) { return __rspack_require(__rspack_require.s = moduleId) }
var __rspack_exports = (__rspack_exec("./index.js"));

}
]);
```
